Get in Touch

The Operating System for
Grassroots Sports

Club Connect brings together players, coaches, parents, and officials in one intelligent platform.

Scroll to explore
The Problem

Grassroots Sports Clubs Deserve Better Tools

Coaches juggle WhatsApp groups, spreadsheets, and paper sign-up sheets. There has to be a better way.

💬

Scattered Communication

5+ WhatsApp groups per team. Important messages get lost in the noise. Parents miss training updates.

📋

Manual Event Planning

Fixtures, training, and socials managed via spreadsheets and memory. Double bookings and no-shows are common.

🏢

No Central Hub

Club admin is fragmented across email, paper forms, and word of mouth. No single source of truth.

Onboarding

Your Club, Up and Running in Minutes

A guided wizard takes you from zero to a fully configured club in under 2 minutes.

1

Set Location

2

Choose Age Groups

✓

You're Live!

✨ AI-Powered
Key Differentiator

AI-Powered Event Creation

Just tell it what you want. The AI handles the rest.

Describe in plain English

Event created in seconds

AI Event Assistant
🤖
🏃
Training Tuesday, Apr 14, 2026 · 6:00 pm Main Training Pitch
|

From words to scheduled events in seconds — no forms, no friction.

Event Management

Every Event Type, One Workflow

Matches, training sessions, and social events — each with purpose-built forms and smart defaults.

Match Training Social
💡 Thoughtful UX details like unsaved-changes protection show the depth of our product thinking.
Schedule

Your Calendar, Always Up to Date

Upcoming fixtures, training, and socials in one chronological view. Filter by type, manage recurring series.

Upcoming Series Filters
Attendance

Know Who's Coming, Instantly

Real-time RSVP tracking with at-a-glance summaries. Players respond in one tap, coaches plan with confidence.

5 Going
5 Not Going
3 Maybe
2 Pending
Communication

Communication, Centralised

Replace scattered WhatsApp groups with one unified, structured messaging platform.

Team Channels Broadcasts Direct Messages Read-Only Admin
5+ WhatsApp groups replaced with 1 unified inbox
Recruitment

Find Players, Build Squads

A marketplace connecting players seeking clubs with clubs seeking players. Filter by age, position, skill level, and location.

Browse Shortlist Create Profile
⚽ Like a transfer market for grassroots football
Safeguarding

Safe Accounts for Young Players

Age-appropriate Player-Lite accounts with parental controls, multi-guardian support, and restricted communications.

Player-Lite Multi-Guardian Age Restrictions
🛡️ Built with safeguarding at the core — GDPR compliant for under-16s
🔒 Back Office
Operations

Secure Admin Portal

A powerful back-office system for Club Connect employees and partners. Manage users, resolve issues, and oversee every aspect of the platform.

Available to partners for managing multiple clubs and teams at scale.

Technology

Built for Scale

Native performance, modern architecture, and accessibility-first design.

📱

Native iOS

Built with SwiftUI for buttery-smooth 60fps performance and native feel.

🤖

AI Integration

Natural language processing turns conversational input into structured data.

⚡

Real-time Messaging

Instant delivery with push notifications, read receipts, and channel management.

♿

Accessibility First

WCAG AAA contrast targets, dynamic type support, and VoiceOver optimised.
